component.name: GenreCard
component.script: sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.accent = m.top.findNode("accent") m.label = m.top.findNode("label") end sub sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.label.text = c.title end sub sub onFocus() if m.top.focusPercent >= 0.5 then m.bg.color = "0xff2424ff" m.accent.color = "0xffffffff" m.label.color = "0xffffffff" else m.bg.color = "0x1c1c22ff" m.accent.color = "0xff2424ff" m.label.color = "0xeeeeeeff" end if end sub
